title: Cruel Angels Thesis 4 min version clean ADV v
display_title: Cruel Angels Thesis 4 min version clean ADV v
wikitext:
[]: Cruel Angel's Thesis: 4 min version, "clean" ADV v Post by nomis1242 » Fri Jan 07, 2011 7:18 pm 2 quick questions about the opening, please 1) what is this 4 minute version ? Is it fanwank or by Gainax? (one of the comments said it was from EoE but I couldn't find it in my copy) 2) The aussie Platinum box set I have (which I think is equivalent to Platinum Perfect) has "clean" opening and closing credits on every disc. Does this just mean without text overlays or is there some other difference? Is there any difference between the versions on each disc, or have ADV given me the same thing 7 times? Thanks!

[]: Post by Xard » Fri Jan 07, 2011 7:53 pm It's official and edited together by Masayuki himself

[]: Post by drinian » Fri Jan 07, 2011 9:49 pm Read this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=339151 Regarding question #2, there is only one OP, so no difference there. IIRC there were different color tints applied to the ED for different episodes, but nothing remarkable. Hard to say whether the Aussie release preserves this, as I'm Region 1.

[]: Cruel Angel's Thesis: 4 min version, "clean" ADV v Post by nomis1242 » Fri Jan 07, 2011 7:18 pm 2 quick questions about the opening, please 1) what is this 4 minute version ? Is it fanwank or by Gainax? (one of the comments said it was from EoE but I couldn't find it in my copy) 2) The aussie Platinum box set I have (which I think is equivalent to Platinum Perfect) has "clean" opening and closing credits on every disc. Does this just mean without text overlays or is there some other difference? Is there any difference between the versions on each disc, or have ADV given me the same thing 7 times? Thanks!

[]: Post by Xard » Fri Jan 07, 2011 7:53 pm It's official and edited together by Masayuki himself

[]: Post by drinian » Fri Jan 07, 2011 9:49 pm Read this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=339151 Regarding question #2, there is only one OP, so no difference there. IIRC there were different color tints applied to the ED for different episodes, but nothing remarkable. Hard to say whether the Aussie release preserves this, as I'm Region 1.
